display.label: Column selector
display.description: Comma-separated list of column selectors (regular expressions) to match TINYINT(1) columns that should be converted to boolean. Format: <table_name>.<column_name>. Example: 'inventory.products.is_active,orders.*.is_processed'

display.label: Enable length checking
display.description: If true, only TINYINT columns with length 1 will be converted to boolean. Set to false for MySQL 8+ where SHOW CREATE TABLE doesn't show length for TINYINT UNSIGNED. Default: true
